title: Raging Kiwiz Community Modpack
description: A modpack for the community of Twitch streamer RagingKiwiz.
body:
A modpack for the community of Twitch streamer RagingKiwiz. It has an emphasis on building, aesthetics, agriculture and tech with a side of magic.

Pam's Harvestcraft 2 created by Pamela Collins (MatrexsVigil) and Rhodox of the Painterly Pack. Permission to use granted by mod description page under condition of credit given.
